# STUDY-003 Memory

Short regeneration pulses repeatedly restored the selective state and sustained reactor performance across ten cycles. Continuous operation provided the matched deactivation control.

## Navigation

- Promoted report: `artifacts/reports/ART-003-cycling-report.md`
- Underlying report: `studies/STUDY-003/output/reports/cycling-report.md`
- Underlying table: `studies/STUDY-003/output/tables/cycling-performance.csv`
- Figure requiring direct inspection: `studies/STUDY-003/output/figures/cycle-stability.ppm`

## Boundary

The evidence supports a regeneration-aware operating model, not an atomic causal mechanism or industrial lifetime claim.
